# Maywood Mile Investments

> Michael Turco is searching for one small business to acquire and run for the long term — a search fund of one, not a private equity firm.

## Who
Michael Turco, Founder. Operating alone.

## What
A search fund: a vehicle to buy a single small business and run it as its next owner, indefinitely. Not multiple acquisitions, not a flip.

## Why
Nine years in product management (Intuit, QuickBooks) and consulting (Deloitte). MBA, University of Wisconsin. Led a new Intuit product from zero to $60M annual revenue in two years, leading a ~15-person cross-functional team.

## Target company
- Revenue: $1M-$7M annually
- Geography: Twin Cities area, western Wisconsin, or the I-94 corridor toward Eau Claire, Madison, and Milwaukee
- Preference: enduringly profitable, strong customer retention

## Contact
- Email: michael.turco@maywoodmile.com
- Phone: 952-206-5170
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/michaelturco/
